_comment: Universal STR marker atoms. Source of truth for all language adapters. Values in any structural.json must be keys here.
question: interrogative — ?, هل, ما, من
negation: negation — not, no, لا, لم, لن, ليس
modal: modal — can, could, should, want, ابغي, يمكن
past: past tense — was, did, كان, فعل
future: future tense — will, going to, سـ, سوف
emphasis: truth assertion — indeed, إنّ, قد, لَـ
